title: DRAWING PRACTISE, DPRK
description:
Pyongyang, April 2011
WE VISIT the Palace of the Children called "Mangyongdae". Everywhere we go, a local guide is waiting for us beside the two guides who already looking after us. We are well taken care of... .This time it is a 13 year old schoolgirl who is leading us through the Children's Palace, stretching over 300'000 square meters of marble on six floors. This Centre offers talented children a highly structured setting for extra-curricular activity.
